---
title: "Country Analysis"
engine: python
---

## Introduction

This page analyzes changes in life expectancy, GDP per capita, and population over time for India using the Gapminder dataset.

```{python}
import pandas as pd
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

df = pd.read_csv("gapminder.csv")
country_df = df[df["country"] == "India"]

fig, ax = plt.subplots()
ax.plot(country_df["year"], country_df["life_expectancy"])
ax.set_title("India Life Expectancy Over Time")

fig
```
